contract: UI UX Pro Max design system, design/content/build plan, selected architecture, asset needs, identity decision

artifact.summary: Phase 3 DESIGN for Captains Fish and Chicken. UI UX Pro Max design system authored (design-system.md): appetite-driving Southern menu-board aesthetic, owner-logo navy + gold palette (amended 2026-07-07: owner supplied the real brand logo, superseding the Captain Red exploration), Archivo Black/Inter type, accessibility floor, call-and-order conversion (no lead form, no SMS — restaurant archetype). Architecture: LocalEvolve restaurant archetype on Astro static. Identity recorded as DECLARED FIXTURES (domain/email .example, gaId G-XXXXXXXXXX) per owner's decision to defer real values to launch — Phase 5 do-not-ship gate will flag them.

checklist.note: UI UX Pro Max guidance run for the 35-route restaurant matrix + Astro stack; output at design-system.md
design-system.md + brand tokens persisted and referenced
identityDecision recorded as fixture mode; real values deferred to Phase 7 per owner
Conversion designed call-only; no lead form / SMS fabricated

designSystem.query: modern nautical navy + gold fast-casual fish & chicken takeout — derived from the owner-supplied Captains shark-captain logo; sticky navy nav, gold conversion CTAs, image-overlay heroes, card-grid menu
designSystem.stack: Astro 6 static SSG + LocalEvolve restaurant archetype + engine-floor Base.astro layout + shared components + vanilla CSS custom-property design tokens
accessibility: alt text on all food images
designSystem.logoAsset: public/logo.png — owner-supplied shark-captain emblem (operator to place file; raster; recraft vector plan-gated)

steps: Wire brand tokens into the theme: set --accent-color to #C1272D and add the token block via the template override channel; wire secondary/cream/ink/harbor.

Author content data files from Phase 0/2 sealed inputs: business.json (NAP, hours.displayText, owner Ray Aqel, geo, opened 2024), site.json (nav, footer, cta=Call, order links, schemaMap), menu.json (14 owner-confirmed priced sections), occasions.json (6, each >=5 FAQ + >=4 cross-links + >=1 featured item), landings.json (10; intent/story/info/faq), neighborhoods.json (2; real local facts or fold).
Build the 35 routes via the restaurant archetype templates (menu hub + [slug], occasions/[slug], root [slug], neighborhoods/[slug], contact, home).
Emit LocalBusiness + Menu (all items priced) + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD; NAP single-location; never surface 3100 6th St SW.
Run factory wire + build; then Phase 5 factory validate + SEO/GEO audit.

Authoring constraints: NO calamari (not on confirmed menu); NewBo excluded from neighborhood facts (use Mound View/Wellington Heights); do not assert unconfirmed hours; dine-in copy withheld (takeout/delivery/catering only).

selectedArchitecture.engine: @localevolve/local-biz-factory-engine restaurant templates + engine-floor Base layout + shared components
selectedArchitecture.conversion: call-only (tel:) + order-online CTAs (DoorDash/Uber Eats/Grubhub); no lead form, no SMS (documented exception; restaurant archetype not bound by auto-dealer CRO gate)
selectedArchitecture.figma: none — repo-owned tokens only (optional Figma handoff intentionally omitted)

assetNeeds.brief: Signature spread — fried catfish + wings + shrimp
Captains wordmark/mark, Captain Red + Fry Gold
Fish family deal / party pan spread
Hush puppies, mac & cheese bites, onion rings
PLACEHOLDER — prefer a REAL owner photo of 1616 1st Ave NE; generated storefront must NOT be presented as an actual photo of the premises

identityDecision.rationale: Owner directed deferral of real domain/email/GA4 to launch. Overtly-synthetic reserved .example + placeholder gaId; Phase 5 do-not-ship gate WILL flag these (intended). paymentAccepted unknown -> omitted from JSON-LD.
